live_transit.overflow: backpressure; no retained history and no truncation

openai_replay_reasoning.structure_accounting: count every normalized mapping entry, sequence entry, and scalar; byte limit is compact UTF-8 JSON including structure
openai_replay_reasoning.overflow: reject the prospective whole item before mutation and continuation dispatch
openai_replay_reasoning.field_policy: never truncate encrypted replay provider fields
openai_replay_reasoning.release: rollback attempt-local additions and release all state at request-context termination

sdk_reasoning.flat_view: derived from the same retained segment text
sdk_reasoning.overflow: drop the oldest complete segments, then a UTF-8-safe prefix of the oldest retained segment

derived_paragraph_separator.text: minimum line feeds needed for two across adjacent non-empty segment boundaries
derived_paragraph_separator.admission: count derived line-feed characters and UTF-8 bytes before the following segment
derived_paragraph_separator.truncation: include in dropped_characters and dropped_utf8_bytes but not dropped_segments

cli_hidden_reasoning.overflow: retain no private reasoning content and perform no reasoning materialization

cli_visible_reasoning.overflow: same oldest-drop UTF-8-safe tail and truncation metadata as SDK reasoning
cli_visible_reasoning.recording: reuse the displayed bounded tail only when display and recording are both enabled

responses_open_item.success: lossless text.done, part.done, and output_item.done content within all three limits
responses_open_item.overflow: suppress the causing delta; if part.added was emitted, close text and part with the exact already-emitted prefix including empty; emit an incomplete item and exactly one failed terminal; release state; never emit a truncated successful item

error.message: Reasoning summary exceeded the configured retention limit.

mcp_reasoning.owner: MCP protocol stream accumulator and resource store
mcp_reasoning.overflow: oldest-drop UTF-8-safe tail with explicit structured truncation metadata
mcp_reasoning.flat_view: derive structuredContent.reasoning from the same bounded reasoningSegments tail and charge paragraph separators to MCP character and byte caps; use the empty string when all reasoning was dropped or rejected
mcp_reasoning.truncation_owner: one adjacent structuredContent.reasoningTruncation aggregate object; never repeat collection-wide counters on segments and never synthesize a metadata segment
mcp_reasoning.truncation_presence: include reasoning, reasoningSegments, and reasoningTruncation together when at least one structured segment is retained or any reasoning content was dropped or rejected; omit all three when neither condition occurred

a2a_reasoning.overflow: retain newest tail by dropping oldest completed artifacts first; if the open artifact still cannot admit a delta, suppress that delta and all later deltas for the identity and finish once with truncation metadata
a2a_reasoning.later_identity: may open after ordinary oldest-completed drop

redaction_pending.owner: same bounded Responses, MCP, or A2A aggregate owner as emitted safe text
redaction_pending.accounting: charge pending raw characters and UTF-8 bytes once; transfer to emitted safe text without double counting
redaction_pending.precheck: retained output plus pending input plus the whole prospective raw delta plus marker reserve before redactor mutation
redaction_pending.marker_reservation_timing: acquire atomically before the first raw delta enters the redactor, hold exactly once while pending, then transfer to emitted marker or release after safe classification
redaction_pending.responses_overflow: balanced incomplete item then one response.failed with reasoning_summary_retention_exceeded
redaction_pending.mcp_overflow: drop oldest completed safe segments, otherwise reject the raw candidate before redactor mutation and record truncation counts; no pending marker is created
redaction_pending.a2a_overflow: reject the raw candidate before redactor mutation, finish the bounded artifact, and record truncation counts; no pending marker is created
redaction_pending.marker_admission: an admitted pending candidate always emits the old marker from its held reserve before boundary close
redaction_pending.confirmed_redaction_latch: once any segment emits the fixed redaction marker, suppress all text for every later identity and any completion flush through the remainder of that protocol stream while preserving structural close and terminal events
redaction_pending.confirmed_redaction_latch_reset: only construction of a fresh protocol stream owner resets the latch; segment, item, representation, correlation, continuation, completion, and terminal boundaries do not
redaction_pending.identity_loss_without_marker: suppress unidentified input and quarantine exactly the next known segment through completion, then resume at the following known identity
redaction_pending.identity_loss_with_marker: emit the old marker before close and engage the confirmed-redaction latch for the remainder of the protocol stream
redaction_pending.completion_with_pending: emit the old marker before close and engage the confirmed-redaction latch for the remainder of the protocol stream

generic_persistence.owner: flow, task, and generic event privacy projectors
generic_persistence.overflow: not applicable; reasoning content is prohibited and only allowlisted scalar metadata may persist

activation.phases_0_through_8_public_adapters: all production and publicly reachable adapters reject summary requests
activation.phase_9: official OpenAI and Azure OpenAI activate atomically; compatible production adapters may then opt in through explicit typed capability

canonical_reasoning_identity.segment_instance_ordinal: zero-based per normalized provider response and prefixed by continuation in aggregate state

abnormal_terminal_shapes.open_part_prefix: if part.added was visible, emit text.done and part.done with exactly the observed prefix including empty

protocol_shapes.responses_sse_sequence: one response-local zero-based contiguous allocator with no gaps or reuse across all events and continuations
protocol_shapes.responses_output_index: one zero-based contiguous index exactly once per outward reasoning, tool, or message item across continuations
protocol_shapes.responses_outward_summary_indices: zero-based contiguous provider-emission-order positions within each outward reasoning item
protocol_shapes.mcp_final_reasoning_presence: include all three fields when reasoningSegments is non-empty or any reasoning content was dropped or rejected; otherwise omit all three
protocol_shapes.mcp_flat_reasoning_value: the exact flat string derived from the retained reasoningSegments tail, or the empty string when reasoningSegments is empty because all reasoning was dropped or rejected
protocol_shapes.redaction_identity_change_with_pending: emit the old marker and engage the confirmed-redaction latch for the remainder of the protocol stream
protocol_shapes.redaction_identity_loss_without_marker: quarantine exactly the next known segment through completion, then resume at the following known identity
